title: Turkish Lamb Koftas
description: A flavorful and juicy lamb kofta recipe inspired by Turkish cuisine, perfect for a quick dinner.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium heat.
In a large bowl, combine lamb, savory, bread, onion, garlic, eggs, salt, and black pepper. Mix well with your hands until just combined.
Do not overmix, as this can make the koftas dense.
Using your hands, shape the mixture into 8-10 koftas.
Place the koftas on the preheated grill and cook for 5-6 minutes per side, or until they are cooked through.
Transfer the koftas to a plate and let them rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve hot with your favorite sides, such as salad or roasted vegetables.
